---
name: Hook failure report
about: Report an internal error in an RDD plugin hook
title: "hook failure: [hook name]"
labels: bug, hooks
assignees: ''
---

**Plugin version:**
<!-- Run: cat .claude-plugin/plugin.json | grep version -->

**Hook name:**
<!-- e.g., tier1-phase-manifest-check, tier1-verify-dispatch -->

**Stderr diagnostic:**
<!-- Paste the diagnostic line from the stderr notice -->

**OS and shell environment:**
<!-- e.g., macOS 15.3, zsh 5.9, bash 5.2 -->

**Hook input JSON (if available):**
<!-- Paste the hook input JSON, redacting any sensitive content -->
```json

```

**Additional context:**
<!-- What were you doing when the error occurred? Which RDD phase? -->
